scenes.title: The Fruit Bowl
scenes.background_prompt: A kitchen counter with a large ceramic fruit bowl, a tiled backsplash, a vase with flowers, and a window letting in morning light. No food items in the bowl.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A kitchen counter in bright morning light. A large white ceramic fruit bowl sits in the center. Inside the bowl: a shiny red apple, a curved yellow banana, and a round orange are arranged naturally. Tucked among them, a green tennis ball with a white curved line sits in the bowl, clearly not a fruit and looking out of place. A glass vase with fresh white daisies stands to the left of the bowl. The tiled backsplash behind is a soft cream color, and a window to the right lets warm morning sunlight stream across the counter, casting soft shadows from the fruit.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place apple in the fruit bowl (left side). Place banana in the bowl (curved naturally). Place orange in the bowl. Place tennis_ball tucked among the fruit in the bowl, clearly not a fruit.
scenes.scene_description: In the immediate foreground at the bottom of the scene is a tiled floor consisting of large, square, light-tan tiles with dark grout lines. Above the floor is a thick wooden countertop made of horizontal planks in a warm brown color with visible wood grain, extending across the width of the image. On the left side of the counter sits a shallow, cream-colored ceramic bowl decorated with a brown pattern of repeating loops and dots around its rim. Inside the bowl, from left to right, is a red apple with a small green leaf, a green tennis_ball with white curved lines, a bright orange with a small green leaf positioned behind the ball, and a yellow banana with brown spots curving upward on the right. To the right of the bowl on the counter is a tan and cream-colored ceramic vase with a wide cream band around its center. The vase holds a bouquet of small peach-colored flowers with yellow centers on thin green stems. Behind the bowl and vase is a backsplash made of square, light-tan marbled tiles, featuring occasional decorative tiles with a blue and white diamond pattern. A large, rectangular window with a tan frame is centered in the wall above the counter. Through the window, a bright daytime scene is visible under a pale blue sky filled with large, fluffy white clouds. On the left side of the window view is a large tree with a brown trunk and green foliage, with several green bushes beneath it. The middle ground through the window shows a green grassy field dotted with small white, yellow, and purple flowers, leading to rolling green hills and stylized trees in the far distance. The wall surrounding the window is a solid, light-cream color, and soft light from the window casts gentle shadows across the wooden countertop.

a long yellow banana with brown spots
